我此后不会忘记这本书和这个作者的(>ω<)！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762029327,"group_id":"7521949664124357694","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"如漫天轻霞掠过夜之深寂，染出华年之初曦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0FiOUtvPl+gL4VagDfvPWtqTbaCl6XkNGwigdHbcgFw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/749be307feed44c2aa35243faef8ff0f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788248&x-signature=jPP3OkkQiVguhU%2BjPAZI0Ny8EdM%3D","user_id":"3259423005082791","user_name":"昭复华年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3259423005082791","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7521949664124357694","book_info":{"abstract":"双女主修仙+天作之合+轻松+甜宠1V1+双向奔赴）
（魅惑狐狸精合欢宗宗主渡明漪vs高冷冰山脸无情宗宗主裴拾秋）
PS：无情宗就是天道给合欢宗发的妻子
渡明漪作为新晋合欢宗宗主，每日没事就爱勾搭勾搭漂亮姐姐，研究研究合欢之术，顺便吐槽一下隔壁无情宗那群不解风情的冰山脸。
正说着呢，隔壁宗主裴拾秋冷着一张脸，拎着一堆天材地宝登门拜访。
裴拾秋：“卦卜情劫，出自合欢，此为小礼，还望笑纳。”
渡明漪：“黄鼠狼给鸡拜年……有话直说。”
裴拾秋：“望合欢宗宗主助我渡劫，事成之后，以丰富资源报答。”
谈恋爱？过情劫？只要好处给得多，都不是问题。
渡劫需动心，渡明漪欣然应允，十八般武艺齐上阵勾引，对自己的手段信心满满。
明诱，暗撩，牵手，拥抱……
但没多久，裴拾秋三书六礼前来提亲，渡明漪心下一沉。
完蛋了，撩过头了，对方居然提亲了，好像杀自己证道了。
眼看婚期越来越近，渡明漪一咬牙，为了自己的小命，逃婚了。
至此，渡明漪逃，裴拾秋追，但依旧插翅难飞。
但事情发展开始不对劲，裴拾秋提剑而来，清冷的脸上满是怨怼。
“夫人，求你，别走……”
“你都要杀我证道了我还不走？”
“什么？我何时说过要杀妻证道","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/006bb2953762cd93f6e966a8a9e2d7b1","author":"知鱼之寻","author_id":"","book_id":"7521949664124357694","book_name":"逃婚后被隔壁宗主追杀半个修仙界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":476,"name":"双向奔赴","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=476&name=双向奔赴&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7523147817351643710","read_count":"25319","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"527748"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"253","tags":"双女主,甜宠,双向奔赴,古代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ofe19dbbedd959be91a923c78604f587e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384082&x-signature=ScN4NgMzuBAhXMyd9FKYl81zxGs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1627715578370461","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"386"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230121226CD728CAF9A0BF52A6E8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,
